/usr/bin/c++  -D_GLIBCXX_USE_CXX11_ABI=0 CMakeFiles/AI-Model.dir/main.cc.o -o AI-Model   -L/lib/intel64  -L/lib/intel64_win  -L/lib/win-x64  -Wl,-rpath,/lib/intel64:/lib/intel64_win:/lib/win-x64:/home/viktor/PRO/libtorch/lib /home/viktor/PRO/libtorch/lib/libtorch.so /home/viktor/PRO/libtorch/lib/libc10.so /home/viktor/PRO/libtorch/lib/libkineto.a -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/viktor/PRO/libtorch/lib/libtorch_cpu.so" -Wl,--as-needed /home/viktor/PRO/libtorch/lib/libc10.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/viktor/PRO/libtorch/lib/libtorch.so" -Wl,--as-needed
